description: Commercial letter addressed to 'my brother' Moshe Perdonel. Mainly in Judaeo-Arabic, with a few words in Hebrew and also Ladino דוזינה. Dating: ca. 16th century. (See T-S 13J24.22 (PGPID 8032) for another letter to the same addressee.) Commodities include tin (qazdīr) and תואקי(?). Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
